scenario_contradiction.threshold: contradiction retained cautious; no explicit fact

scenario_detected_lie.threshold: reliability drop >= 0.05 and contradiction value retained

scenario_long_silence.threshold: after 100 turns reliability within 0.15 of prior mean

scenario_roleplay_isolation.threshold: roleplay causes zero factual reliability movement and no long-term promotion

review_notes.conceptual_code_audit: M11 uses deterministic ledgers over extractor enums; no token-bag matching or legacy scoring functions are composed into M11.
review_notes.legacy_import_boundary: No module under segmentum/user_model imports memory_dynamics, value_memory, or memory_retrieval.
review_notes.synthetic_fixture_scope: Calibration turns use a deterministic scripted extractor fixture so replay is byte-identical without a live LLM.
